name: The Lighting Ages
short_description: RPG adventure game where player mission is to find skulls to finish levels and also accomplish different quests and avoid enemies
detailed_description:
STORY:

Player controls armored character in this medieval style 3rd person RPG game. Player mission is find skulls to finish levels. Levels contain different enemies with swords and some magic skills. Also levels includes wolfs which attacks against player if he goes too close. Also player can use horse to move faster to different locations. Level 5 also contains different quests. NPC character gives player differents quests like killing enemies, collecting apples and saving princess. So can you be the rpg game hero and find all skulls and finish all quests

FEATURES:

- 5 levels
- RPG Game with different battle mechanics
- Different enemies with swords and magic skills
- Wolfs which attacks against player if he goes too close
- Ridable horse. Transfer to different locations faster by using horse
- 1 level with different tasks like saving princess and collecting items
- Steam achievements
